# Quotation (Template)

A shorter, numbers-only companion to the Proposal — used when a client just wants the price confirmed in writing (e.g. after a verbal discussion), rather than the full narrative proposal.

---

**Quotation #:** [sequential, e.g. AEGIS-Q-0001]
**Date issued:**
**Valid until:** [14–30 days]

**Client:** [Name / Business]
**Project:** [Short title]

| Item | Description | Price |
|---|---|---|
| | | £ |
| | | £ |
| **Subtotal** | | **£** |
| VAT (if registered) | | £ |
| **Total** | | **£** |

**Payment terms:** [50% deposit / 50% on completion, or 30/40/30 — per [`PricingStrategy.md`](../PricingStrategy.md)]

**Included:** [1-line scope summary]
**Not included:** [anything a client might assume but isn't — see the Proposal template's "explicitly out of scope" section for the full list]

To accept this quotation, reply confirming and we'll send a Statement of Work and deposit Payment Link.
